items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Gpt 5 5 Instant System Card".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=GPT-5.5 Instant System Card published=Tue, 05 May 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-instant-system-card description= title=Top 10 uses for Codex at work published=Thu, 23 Apr 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/academy/top-10-use-cases-codex-for-work description=Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.
diff_excerpt: title=GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
description=Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
+description=Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.
description=Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.
-description=Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow.
-description=Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.
